working_on: Cleanup-batch session: close Issue #54 (next_session_handle structured-field requirement per Pushback Cluster A from S-0097 audit). Five deliverables: schema field, archive-audit row + str_or_null shape, validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer() emitting four soft-warn categories, shutdown step 7b + Skill mirror + tools-validate-interpretation entries, ADR 0049 amendment (Decision 6).
declared_scope: Close GitHub Issue #54 inline. Add next_session_handle field (str | None) to engine/session/current.json schema, initialized null at eager-claim, filled at shutdown step 7b. Extend engine/tools/audit_archive_structured_fields.py REQUIRED_ARCHIVE_FIELDS with the new field row + extend shape_check() to support str_or_null shape token. New engine/tools/validate.py function validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer() reading current.json's outcome_summary + next_session_handle; gated to --final-check; emits four soft-warn categories per the Disposition table (outcome_summary_unhandled_defer, next_session_handle_unknown_issue, next_session_handle_unknown_session, next_session_handle_malformed); offline-graceful gh verification. Add shutdown step 7b prompt to engine/operations/session-shutdown-sequence.md + .claude/skills/session-shutdown-sequence/SKILL.md mirror; extend outcome_summary_soft_warns example block with the four new categories; add four entries to engine/operations/tools-validate-interpretation.md. Update engine/operations/session-build-lifecycle.md schema block + .claude/skills/session-build-lifecycle/SKILL.md mirror. Amend engine/adr/0049-scope-lock-at-boot-and-descope-reorder-audit-at-shutdown.md with Amendment (S-0100) introducing Decision 6. Pytests: TestOutcomeSummaryUnhandledDefer (~11 tests covering hedge/no-hedge × handle present/null/missing/malformed × verification paths × offline-graceful) + TestStrOrNullShape (3 tests). Layer 1 contract docstring on the new validator function per ADR 0038. Layer 3 cold-context review at shutdown. Standard close: STATE.md, ENGINE_LOG.md, archive S-0100.json, MemPalace diary write, validate.py 0 hard-fails.
outcome_summary: S-0100 closed Issue #54 (next_session_handle structured-field requirement) end-to-end via in-place ADR 0049 amendment introducing Decision 6. Five deliverables across three commits beyond eager-claim. (1) Schema field next_session_handle: str | None on current.json + the archive — initialized null at eager-claim per session-build-lifecycle.md + Skill mirror; required from S-0100 onward per audit_archive_structured_fields.py REQUIRED_ARCHIVE_FIELDS row (since_session S-0100, shape str_or_null). (2) shape_check() learns the str_or_null shape token — None is the load-bearing 'explicit no defer' semantic, distinct from missing field which still hard-fails. (3) New validate.py function validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer() gated to --final-check; emits four soft-warn categories per the disposition table: outcome_summary_unhandled_defer (primary positive — handle key absent), next_session_handle_unknown_issue (gh issue verified missing — best-effort offline-graceful), next_session_handle_unknown_session (S-NNNN matches no archive AND not next-claim slot), next_session_handle_malformed (string shape wrong, or non-string non-null type). Hedge regex set: 7 patterns drawn from canonical S-0071/S-0048 [pushback] drawers in paideia/problems; case-insensitive, whitespace-tolerant; conservative starting set. (4) Shutdown step 7b prompt added to session-shutdown-sequence.md + Skill mirror with literal text; outcome_summary_soft_warns example block extended with the 4 new categories at zero count; tools-validate-interpretation.md gains 4 entries between scope_delivery_non_yes and timestamp_helper_bypass. (5) ADR 0049 Amendment (S-0100) introducing Decision 6 placed at the same location as the prior S-0083 retire-amendment; preserves Decisions 1/2/4/5 as-is, Decision 3 stays retired. Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns 375 (same as eager-claim baseline; new audit no-ops at this session because outcome_summary fills only at step 8, by-design mid-session safety). Full pytest suite: 1055 pass (+33 new). Layer 3 cold-context review of validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer per ADR 0038 returned zero contract-vs-code drift. MemPalace decision drawer at paideia/decisions (drawer_paideia_decisions_c058179e308b6cc00499c591). Closes 4 of the original 6 health-check-finding Issues from S-0098 (cumulative with S-0099); 4 remain queued for additional sessions today: #52, #53, #48, #49. Note for #52: S-0100's four new soft-warn categories are too fresh to classify — mark actively-tracked, defer-to-next-cadence rather than including in the 29-category sweep.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — all five deliverables landed as scoped: schema field bootstrap, audit_archive_structured_fields row + str_or_null shape token, validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer function emitting four soft-warn categories with offline-graceful gh verification, shutdown step 7b prompt + Skill mirror + tools-validate-interpretation entries + soft-warns block extension, ADR 0049 in-place amendment introducing Decision 6. 33 new pytests landed (26 validator + 7 audit), 1055 total pass.
